title: UTILITY ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: SALVATION ARMY CASCADE DIVISION ALBANY UTILITY ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers assistance for electric, gas, or water payments. Funding is limited. Does not provide heating fuel assistance. 345 Columbus Street SE Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Households who have received a shut-off notice. Cannot assist if the utility has already been disconnected. Hours: January-October: Tuesday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-4pm Email (541) 928-4774 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 928-4774 Main phone Main phone (541) 928-4774 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for an appointment and to check if funds are available. Appointments are first-come, first-served. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Shut-off notice AREA SERVED: Linn County and City of Albany SITE HOURS: Tuesday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: From 99E, turn on Columbus Street and continue for one block. Located across from the Waverly School. Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance Gas Service Payment Assistance Water Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - SALVATION ARMY FOOD BANK If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SALVATION ARMY CASCADE DIVISION ALBANY
